'''Sand bears''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bear/Legends|bear]] that were native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kallistas]]. They typically attacked settlers, though this would never occur near the planet's [[City/Legends|cities]]. The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Jondrell Inx]] stained some of his clothes with sand bear [[Blood/Legends|blood]], pretending it was that of his hostage, [[Cressis Linrec]] as a threat while demanding a ransom.<ref name="TPO" />

{{Creature-stub}}
